title: cymbidium ensifolium var. koran
intro: Cymbidium ensifolium var. koran, a type of orchid native to China and other parts of Asia, is a plant used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It is valued for its ability to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to promote health benefits such as improved respiratory function, reduced fever, and relief from coughs and colds. Cymbidium ensifolium var. koran can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
